puzzleDescription: The final Array challenge! Calculate the average of all numbers in the array. Average = (Sum of all elements) / (Number of elements).
objective: Given the array 'grades', calculate and print the average value.
hints: First, use a for loop to add every element of 'grades' to 'sum'.
The formula for average is 'sum / grades.length'.
Make sure the 'println' happens after the loop is completely finished.
